query: SELECT mvs.id, mvs.jobId, mvs.sceneIndex, mvs.status, mvs.errorMessage, mvs.taskId, mvs.updatedAt FROM musicVideoScenes mvs WHERE mvs.status = 'failed' ORDER BY mvs.updatedAt DESC LIMIT 20;
